title: AN ACT TO FURTHER AMEND SECTION TWENTY HUNDRED EIGHTY-SIX OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE CODE BY PROVIDING QUARTERS FOR THE PROVINCIAL VICE-GOVERNOR, OR ALLOWING THE VALUE THEREOF IN ADDITION TO HIS SALARY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 9286 / 62 OG No. 40, 7207 (October 3, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4451, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO FURTHER AMEND SECTION TWENTY HUNDRED EIGHTY-SIX OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE CODE BY PROVIDING QUARTERS FOR THE PROVINCIAL VICE-GOVERNOR, OR ALLOWING THE VALUE THEREOF IN ADDITION TO HIS SALARY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section twenty hundred eighty-six of the Administrative Code, as amended by Republic Act Numbered Three thousand two hundred sixty-six, is further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 2086.

Quarters of Provincial Governors and Vice-Governors.

âThe provincial board may, in its discretion provide quarters for the provincial governor and vice-governor, or allow the value thereof, in addition to their salary."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
